pattern: Sliding window of fixed size k: add the incoming character's vowel contribution and subtract the outgoing one.
hints: Count the vowels in the first window of size k as the initial value.
Slide the window one step at a time: if the new character is a vowel add 1, if the leaving character was a vowel subtract 1.
Track the running maximum and return it after traversing the entire string.

edge_inputs.description: k equals string length, all vowels
window finds a block of all vowels
string is all vowels, any window equals k
best window is not at the start or end
only last window is fully vowels

stress.description: long random string with random k
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    import string
    s = ''.join(rng.choice(string.ascii_lowercase) for _ in range(size))
    k = rng.randint(1, size)
    return [s, k]
